messages.content: Got any of those hams left? Need to buy some tickets!

100% man. Drop in for a chat and a beer whenever youâre free. 

Josh

Hey guys, gravy day is cpming up and I am keen for some gravy! But also keen to see if you'd be open to us at Shout getting on board as a sort of sponsor? I'm going to message Michael as well about it, but I was wondering if we donated a keg of the Mullet, whether it could be either a bar shout from us or some cheap beers on the day? We're gearing up for a bit of a campaign for the hottest 100 of beers and would love it if we could bludge some votes off punters. Also, its my favourite night of the year.

Guys, I don't know if you've been inundated about this yet, but your beef and gravy rolls for gravy day haunt my dreams. It has leapfrogged another local burger as my death row meal. Holy hell, please consider keeping them in some rotation. Otherwise I might cry...
